summary: Role 9 install/new-PC/release parity review returned REVISE_REQUIRED. P2-12 names the right install/release parity requirements, but global acceptance tests do not yet require installer/version/release/uninstall parity verifiers or a concrete release manifest proof.
decisions: No source or documentation edits were made for this reviewer pass.
P2-12 direction is correct but not strong enough as a completion gate until installer/release/new-PC parity verifiers are included in global acceptance and verify:goal.
Current installer and docs contain useful version/ref/hook/release checks, but the revised consensus plan does not make those checks mandatory in its global gate list.
next_steps: Revise docs/OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md to add installer:verify:version, installer:verify:approval, installer:verify:launchers, installer:verify:managed-hook, uninstall:verify, installer:win, and release:win -- -SkipUpload or an equivalent release-manifest verifier to global acceptance.
Add explicit P2-12 acceptance for a release manifest/proof artifact covering app commit, data commit/ref, installer version, ZIP SHA, tag, GitHub asset identity, and required verifier status.
After revising, rerun all ten reviewers in the same round.
